testcase.name: test_05_verify_trade_history_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: Trade history missing commission assert 'commission' in {'actual_profit': 293.66, 'created_at': '2026-01-16T12:00:00+00:00', 'direction': 'SELL', 'id': 'cadf239a-0343-4885-b04d-999aa0cc5d93', ...}

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_54_data_consistency.py:125: in test_05_verify_trade_history_endpoint assert "commission" in trade, "Trade history missing commission" E AssertionError: Trade history missing commission E assert 'commission' in {'actual_profit': 293.66, 'created_at': '2026-01-16T12:00:00+00:00', 'direction': 'SELL', 'id': 'cadf239a-0343-4885-b04d-999aa0cc5d93', ...}

testcase.name: test_01_verify_trade_logs_match_trade_history

failure.message: AssertionError: Commission mismatch for trade cadf239a-0343-4885-b04d-999aa0cc5d93 assert None == 0.0 + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe52a96baf40>('commission') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe52a96baf40> = {'actual_profit': 293.66, 'created_at': '2026-01-16T12:00:00+00:00', 'direction': 'SELL', 'id': 'cadf239a-0343-4885-b04d-999aa0cc5d93', ...}.get + and 0.0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe52a977fd40>('commission') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe52a977fd40> = {'actual_profit': 293.66, 'commission': 0.0, 'created_at': '2026-01-16T12:00:00Z', 'direction': 'SELL', ...}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_54_data_consistency.py:291: in test_01_verify_trade_logs_match_trade_history assert trade.get("commission") == log.get("commission"), \ E AssertionError: Commission mismatch for trade cadf239a-0343-4885-b04d-999aa0cc5d93 E assert None == 0.0 E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe52a96baf40>('commission') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe52a96baf40> = {'actual_profit': 293.66, 'created_at': '2026-01-16T12:00:00+00:00', 'direction': 'SELL', 'id': 'cadf239a-0343-4885-b04d-999aa0cc5d93', ...}.get E + and 0.0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe52a977fd40>('commission') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe52a977fd40> = {'actual_profit': 293.66, 'commission': 0.0, 'created_at': '2026-01-16T12:00:00Z', 'direction': 'SELL', ...}.get
